Bug / Task Description: Before embedding, document text is split into fixed-size character windows, and the chunker is configured with an overlap so that adjacent windows share context at their seams. The fixed-size chunker currently advances by a whole window between chunks, producing non-overlapping output and discarding the configured overlap. Make consecutive fixed-size chunks overlap by the configured number of characters, while still covering the entire text and terminating. Add a hidden behavioural test under tests/unit/ that captures this.
Commit Subject: fix(chunking): preserve configured overlap in the fixed-size chunker
